name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusionN ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES proc, state



TypeOK == /\ proc \in [proc : 1..N]
          /\ state \in [proc : {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Init == /\ proc = 1..N
        /\ state = [p \in proc |-> "idle"]

Next == \/ \* Process p attempts to enter critical section
        /\ \E p \in proc : state[p] = "idle" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
        \/ \* Process p enters critical section if no other process is in critical section
        /\ \E p \in proc : state[p] = "trying" /\ \A q \in proc : q # p => state[q] # "critical" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
        \/ \* Process p exits critical section
        /\ \E p \in proc : state[p] = "critical" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES state, votes



TypeOK == /\ state \in {"INIT", "PREPARE", "COMMIT", "ABORT"}
          /\ votes \in Seq({TRUE) 
          /\ Len(votes) <= N

Init == /\ state = "INIT"
        /\ votes = <<>>

Next == \/ /\ state = "INIT"
              /\ state' = "PREPARE"
              /\ votes' = <<>>
          \/ /\ state = "PREPARE"
              /\ votes' = Append(votes, TRUE)
              /\ state' = state
          \/ /\ state = "PREPARE"
              /\ votes' = Append(votes, FALSE)
              /\ state' = state
          \/ /\ state = "PREPARE"
              /\ Len(votes) = N
              /\ IF ALL(votes, v -> v) THEN
                  state' = "COMMIT"

                  state' = "ABORT"

              /\ votes' = votes
          \/ /\ state \in {"COMMIT", "ABORT"}
              /\ state' = state
              /\ votes' = votes
          END

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes>> /\ TypeOK

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* State can be "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]  \* 0 means fork is free, 1 means taken
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ \E j \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = 0
          /\ forks[(i % N) + 1] = 0
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1, ![(i % N) + 1] = 1]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    \/ \E j \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![(i % N) + 1] = 0]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
    \/ \E j \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "thinking"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \/ /\ flag[i] = FALSE
              /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
              /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          \/ /\ flag[i] = TRUE
              /\ num' = num
              /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size



    (* consumer reads from q[head] *)




TypeOK == /\ q \in [1..K -> Nat]
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

Next == \/ (* Producer action *)
          /\ size < K
          /\ var item = 0 (* placeholder for producer input *)
          /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = item]
          /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
          /\ size' = size + 1
          /\ head' = head
          /\ q = q'
        \/ (* Consumer action *)
          /\ size > 0
          /\ var item = q[head] (* placeholder for consumer output *)
          /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
          /\ size' = size - 1
          /\ tail' = tail
          /\ q' = q

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>> /\ TypeOK

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS NULL, Server

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [s \in Server |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [s \in Server |-> "Follower"]

Next == \/ \E s \in Server:
          /\ state[s] = "Follower"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
        \/ \E s \in Server:
          /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        \/ \E s \in Server:
          /\ state[s] = "Leader"
          /\ state' = state
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  \/ /\ reader_enter
     /\ readers' = readers + 1
     /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ /\ reader_exit
     /\ readers' = readers - 1
     /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ /\ writer_enter
     /\ writer_active' = TRUE
     /\ readers' = readers
  \/ /\ writer_exit
     /\ writer_active' = FALSE
     /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Channels



VARIABLES state, localState, channelState, markerSent

Init == 
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "initial"]
  /\ localState = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ channelState = [c \in Channels |-> <<>>]
  /\ markerSent = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]

RecordState(i) == 
  /\ state[i] = "initial"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "recorded"]
  /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![i] = localState[i] + 1]
  /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = <<>> \mid c \in Channels \land c[1] = i]
  /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE \mid c \in Channels \land c[1] = i]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, markerSent>>

ReceiveMarker(c) ==
  /\ markerSent[c] = TRUE
  /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = <<localState[c[2]]>>]
  /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![c] = FALSE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, markerSent>>

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N : RecordState(i)
  \/ \E c \in Channels : ReceiveMarker(c)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, localState, channelState, markerSent>> 

TypeOK == 
  /\ state \in [1..N -> {"initial", "recorded"}]
  /\ localState \in [1..N -> Nat]
  /\ channelState \in [Channels -> Seq(Nat)]
  /\ markerSent \in [Channels -> BOOLEAN]

---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == token = 1

Next == token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_token

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS FiniteSet, NULL

VARIABLES store

Keys == {"k1", "k2", "k3"}  \* Example finite key set
Values == {"v1", "v2", "v3"} \* Example finite value set

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        \/ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values \cup {NULL}]
          /\ Keys \in FiniteSet
          /\ Values \in FiniteSet

---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen

CONSTANT N, M, V, NULL

TypeOK == acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]] /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]] /\ chosen \in V

Init == acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]] /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]] /\ chosen = NULL

Prepare(p) == LET b == proposers[p].ballot + 1 IN
  proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> proposers[p].value]] /\ acceptors' = acceptors

Promise(p) == LET b == proposers[p].ballot IN
  acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![i] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> acceptors[i].value] : i \in 1..N]

Accept(p) == LET b == proposers[p].ballot, v == proposers[p].value IN
  acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![i] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> v] : i \in 1..N]

Chosen(v) == acceptors' = acceptors /\ chosen' = v

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS File, ChunkSize, MaxRetries, Timeout
VARIABLES acked, chunks, retransmits, sent, timer

    /\ chunks = SubSeq(File, 1, ChunkSize) \* Initial chunk sequence
    /\ sent = {} \* No chunks sent yet
    /\ acked = {} \* No chunks acknowledged yet
    /\ retransmits = [i \in 1..Len(chunks) |-> 0] \* No retransmissions yet
    /\ timer = 0 \* No timeout yet

Next ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
        /\ i \notin sent \* Chunk not yet sent
        /\ sent' = sent \cup {i} \* Mark chunk as sent
        /\ retransmits' = [retransmits EXCEPT ![i] = 0] \* Reset retransmission count
        /\ timer' = Timeout \* Reset timeout counter
    \/ \E i \in sent \setminus acked :
        /\ timer = 0 \* No timeout yet
        /\ timer' = Timeout \* Reset timeout counter
    \/ \E i \in sent \setminus acked :
        /\ timer > 0 \* Timeout counter active
        /\ timer' = timer - 1 \* Decrement timeout counter
        \/ /\ timer' = 0 \* Timeout counter reached zero
           /\ retransmits[i] < MaxRetries \* Retransmission count below maximum
           /\ retransmits' = [retransmits EXCEPT ![i] = retransmits[i] + 1] \* Increment retransmission count
        \/ /\ timer' = 0 \* Timeout counter reached zero
           /\ retransmits[i] >= MaxRetries \* Retransmission count at or above maximum
           /\ sent' = sent \setminus {i} \* Remove chunk from sent set
           /\ retransmits' = [retransmits EXCEPT ![i] = 0] \* Reset retransmission count
    \/ \E i \in acked :
        /\ acked' = acked \setminus {i} \* Remove chunk from acknowledged set
    \/ /\ chunks' = chunks \* No changes to chunk sequence
        /\ sent' = sent \* No changes to sent set
        /\ acked' = acked \* No changes to acknowledged set
        /\ retransmits' = retransmits \* No changes to retransmission count
        /\ timer' = timer \* No changes to timeout counter

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<chunks, sent, acked, retransmits, timer>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ chunks \in Seq(Seq(File))
    /\ sent \in SUBSET 1..Len(chunks)
    /\ acked \in SUBSET 1..Len(chunks)
    /\ retransmits \in [1..Len(chunks) -> 0..MaxRetries]
    /\ timer \in 0..Timeout

====
